data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of exporting for compliance audits, as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality of this export feature. The absence of any related evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting this requirement, as the exploratory step did not confirm coverage or identify a precise gap.
gaps: No evidence of the export functionality for compliance audits.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the export functionality for compliance audits.
